form.name: Full Name
form.luggage_warning_body: A 4-seat taxi trunk fits a maximum of 4 suitcases (or equivalent: 3 suitcases + 2 trolleys). Your luggage requires a 6-seat taxi — the fare will be adjusted accordingly.

price.note: Fixed price confirmed at booking. Surcharge only if extra stop or detour requested.
price.on_request: We don't have a set price for this route yet. We'll get back to you shortly after your booking.

steps.title: Get your price
steps.desc: Enter your trip details and instantly receive a guaranteed fixed price.

steps.title: Confirm your booking
steps.desc: Fill in your contact details. Confirmation sent by email or WhatsApp.

steps.title: Receive your driver's info
steps.desc: Before departure, you receive your driver's name and phone number.

steps.title: Your driver is waiting
steps.desc: Your driver meets you at the agreed spot with your name. Support available throughout the trip.

items.q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
items.a: Your driver tracks your flight in real time until your landing in Israel. If delayed, they adjust their arrival time automatically at no extra charge.

items.q: How do I find my driver at the airport?
items.a: You'll receive your driver's phone number before the trip. They will wait for you on level 2 of terminal 3, gate 23.

items.q: Can I travel with extra luggage?
items.a: Yes. Our vehicles accommodate standard suitcases and bags. For exceptional volume, note it when booking.

items.q: When and how do I pay?
items.a: Payment is made directly to the driver at the end of the trip, in cash only. No online prepayment required.
Yes. Free cancellation up to 2 hours before departure. Contact us by WhatsApp or phone.
Yes. Mention it in the booking notes. An additional charge may apply.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Moveo Taxi respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect and use personal information when you use our taxi booking service.
privacy.section1_text: We collect your name, phone number, email (optional), and trip details when you make a booking. This information is used solely to confirm and fulfill your reservation.
privacy.section2_text: Your booking information is stored securely and is only accessible to our team. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.section3_text: For any privacy-related questions, please contact us via

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Moveo Taxi's booking service, you agree to the following terms.
terms.booking_text: Bookings are confirmed upon contact from our team. You may cancel up to 2 hours before pickup without charge. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
terms.pricing_text: All prices shown are fixed rates in New Israeli Shekel (₪), confirmed at the time of booking. Prices will not change unless your route changes.
terms.payment_text: Payment is made directly to the driver at the end of the trip, in cash or by card. No online prepayment is required.
terms.liability_text: Moveo Taxi is not responsible for delays caused by traffic, weather, or other circumstances beyond our control.
terms.contact_text: For questions about these terms, please

routePage.hero_subtitle: Professional private transfer | Fixed price | Available 24/7
routePage.fixed_price_desc: No meter, no surprises — price agreed in advance
routePage.available_desc: Round-the-clock service, including weekends and holidays
routePage.multilingual_desc: Hebrew, French, English, Russian and Spanish
routePage.faq_q1: How much does a taxi from {from} to {to} cost?
routePage.faq_a1: The price for the trip from {from} to {to} is calculated based on distance and vehicle type. Get an instant price on the website — no hidden fees.
routePage.faq_q2: How long does the trip from {from} to {to} take?
routePage.faq_a2: The average journey time from {from} to {to} is {duration}, depending on traffic.
routePage.faq_q3: How do I book a taxi from {from} to {to}?
routePage.faq_a3: Simply fill in the form on the website, choose your date and time, and get instant confirmation. You can also book via WhatsApp or phone.
routePage.faq_a4: Yes, a night rate applies between 21:00 and 06:00. The exact price appears in the booking form.
routePage.meta_title: Taxi {from} to {to} | Fixed Price | Moveo Taxi
routePage.meta_desc: Book a private taxi from {from} to {to}. Guaranteed fixed price, professional drivers, available 24/7. Easy online booking.
